datasets.name: kpi_total_gaps
queryLines:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_gaps
FROM
  vf_health.ghana.agent_gap_analysis

datasets.name: kpi_critical_deserts
queryLines:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) as critical_deserts
FROM
  vf_health.ghana.agent_medical_deserts
WHERE
  severity = 'critical'

datasets.name: kpi_priority_interventions
queryLines:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) as priority_interventions
FROM
  vf_health.ghana.agent_recommendations
WHERE
  priority IN ('critical', 'high')

datasets.name: kpi_facilities_analyzed
queryLines:
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT row_id) as facilities_analyzed
FROM
  vf_health.ghana.silver_facilities_clean

datasets.name: desert_severity_by_district
queryLines:
SELECT
  district,
  region,
  AVG(desert_score) as avg_desert_score,
  MAX(severity) as severity
FROM
  vf_health.ghana.agent_medical_deserts
GROUP BY
  district,
  region
ORDER BY
  avg_desert_score DESC
LIMIT 30

datasets.name: critical_gaps_by_type
queryLines:
SELECT
  capability,
  COUNT(*) as gap_count,
  severity
FROM
  vf_health.ghana.agent_gap_analysis
WHERE
  severity = 'critical'
GROUP BY
  capability,
  severity
ORDER BY
  gap_count DESC

datasets.name: gaps_by_region
queryLines:
SELECT
  region,
  capability,
  COUNT(*) as gap_count
FROM
  vf_health.ghana.agent_gap_analysis
WHERE
  region IS NOT NULL
  AND region != 'UNKNOWN'
  AND TRIM(region) != ''
GROUP BY
  region,
  capability
ORDER BY
  region,
  gap_count DESC

datasets.name: priority_matrix
queryLines:
SELECT
  region,
  district,
  AVG(gap_score) as avg_gap_score,
  AVG(desert_score) as avg_desert_score,
  MAX(priority) as priority_level,
  COUNT(*) as recommendation_count
FROM
  vf_health.ghana.agent_recommendations
WHERE
  gap_score IS NOT NULL
  AND desert_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  region,
  district
ORDER BY
  (AVG(gap_score) + AVG(desert_score)) DESC

datasets.name: top_priority_districts
queryLines:
SELECT
  region,
  district,
  MAX(priority) as priority_level,
  AVG(gap_score) as avg_gap_score,
  AVG(desert_score) as avg_desert_score,
  COUNT(*) as total_recommendations,
  (AVG(gap_score) + AVG(desert_score)) as combined_score
FROM
  vf_health.ghana.agent_recommendations
WHERE
  gap_score IS NOT NULL
  AND desert_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  region,
  district
ORDER BY
  combined_score DESC
LIMIT 20

datasets.name: severity_distribution
queryLines:
SELECT
  severity,
  COUNT(*) as district_count,
  AVG(desert_score) as avg_score
FROM
  vf_health.ghana.agent_medical_deserts
GROUP BY
  severity
ORDER BY
  CASE severity
    WHEN 'critical' THEN 1
    WHEN 'severe' THEN 2
    WHEN 'moderate' THEN 3
    ELSE 4
  END

datasets.name: desert_vs_facilities
queryLines:
WITH facility_counts AS (
  SELECT
    address_city as district,
    COUNT(*) as facility_count
  FROM
    vf_health.ghana.silver_facilities_clean
  WHERE
    address_city IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(address_city) != ''
  GROUP BY
    address_city
),
desert_data AS (
  SELECT
    district,
    region,
    AVG(desert_score) as avg_desert_score,
    MAX(severity) as severity
  FROM
    vf_health.ghana.agent_medical_deserts
  GROUP BY
    district,
    region
)
SELECT
  d.district,
  d.region,
  COALESCE(f.facility_count, 0) as facility_count,
  d.avg_desert_score,
  d.severity,
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(f.facility_count, 0) <= 2 THEN '1-2 facilities'
    WHEN COALESCE(f.facility_count, 0) <= 5 THEN '3-5 facilities'
    WHEN COALESCE(f.facility_count, 0) <= 10 THEN '6-10 facilities'
    ELSE '10+ facilities'
  END as facility_tier
FROM
  desert_data d
    LEFT JOIN facility_counts f
      ON d.district = f.district
ORDER BY
  facility_count,
  avg_desert_score DESC

datasets.name: critical_interventions
queryLines:
SELECT
  region,
  district,
  recommendation_type,
  action,
  estimated_impact,
  target_metric,
  gap_score,
  desert_score,
  (gap_score + desert_score) as combined_priority_score
FROM
  vf_health.ghana.agent_recommendations
WHERE
  priority = 'critical'
  AND gap_score IS NOT NULL
  AND desert_score IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
  combined_priority_score DESC
LIMIT 30

datasets.name: anomaly_metrics
queryLines:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_signals,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN signal_flag = true THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) as flagged_anomalies,
  AVG(signal_score) as avg_risk_score,
  COUNT(DISTINCT signal_type) as signal_types
FROM
  vf_health.ghana.gold_risk_signals
WHERE
  signal_type != 'none'

datasets.name: medical_desert_map
queryLines:
SELECT
  district,
  region,
  AVG(desert_score) as avg_desert_score,
  MAX(severity) as severity_level,
  COUNT(DISTINCT district) as district_count,
  SUM(total_facilities) as facilities,
  SUM(emergency_sites) as emergency_sites,
  SUM(maternity_sites) as maternity_sites,
  SUM(surgical_sites) as surgical_sites,
  SUM(icu_sites) as icu_sites
FROM
  vf_health.ghana.agent_medical_deserts
WHERE
  region IS NOT NULL
  AND district IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  district,
  region
ORDER BY
  avg_desert_score DESC

frame.title: Priority Matrix: Gap vs Desert Severity
Critical Interventions Needed - Top 30 Priority Actions
